name: The Fun Gang | a.k.a. the $!$! Squad
description:
"Yeah, that Thrash Machine you guys made? It sucked ASS! Heh, good thing you didn't make anything better, or else you all might've—like—died for real."

❤️💚💜

Hello!

This has been a bot that I've been procrastinating for a while, and honestly I think I kind of blew it out of proportion; considering this bot has my largest token count and has my longest greeting as of publishing this bot. Either way, I enjoyed testing this and I think I've got it working in a good enough state to be ready for public, at least on my end.

That being said, this bot probably won't work very good on JanitorLLM, so I would heavily advise getting Deepseek like I recommend with all of my bots. This is especially important because I doubt JanitorLLM will have a good enough context size to remember the huge chunks of info I've put into this bot, so for your own sake, please use Deepseek. You won't regret it, I hope!

As for the scenario of this bot—Ralsei somehow managed to come to the Light World, and so now the Fun Gang has to try and make him fit in with the rest of the Hometown residents in the Light World while continuing to seal the Dark Fountains in the Dark World whenever they appear.

Consequently, this bot is heavily and centrally focused on their interactions in the Light World, but you could hypothetically do some roleplays and chats in the Dark World. I've included details on their Dark World appearances and their general stories up until the end of Chapter 1 just for this reason, in case anyone would like to try. I haven't personally tested this myself, though. Also, as a result, Susie's personality is closer to her Chapter 1 appearance than 3 and 4, sorry.

Please provide any feedback and your reception to this bot, as I think I experimented quite a bit with this one and would like to hear if you think it is well-made or over-baked.

VERY, VERY, VERY long message warning (2.3k tokens), tested with Deepseek! Take care. ❤️

Artist Link: (https://x.com/XEXEEZY)(https://x.com/user823493247)
